posts.author: piorkowd (Daniel Piorkowski)
posts.cookedHtml:
Description

There should be a way to view an item’s description’s version history (similar to the version history of a workdoc). It’s critical that if someone accidentally deletes something from the description that it can be recoverable.

What are you trying to achieve

Recoverable description content and auditability of who updated the item’s description
